cookie_consent.title: Utilizziamo i cookie
cookie_consent.description: Utilizziamo cookie essenziali per la sicurezza e il funzionamento della piattaforma. I cookie opzionali ci aiutano a migliorare la tua esperienza e a monitorare gli errori.

footer.built_on_nexus: Realizzato su Project NEXUS — Piattaforma Comunitaria Open Source

aria.click_or_drag_to_upload: Clicca o trascina per caricare immagini

skills.load_failed: Impossibile caricare le categorie di competenze

skills.offering_desc: membri disposti a condividere questa competenza con altri
skills.requesting_desc: membri che cercano di imparare o ricevere aiuto con questa competenza

skills.no_skills_yet: Nessuna competenza elencata in questa categoria ancora.

members.description: Esplora i membri della comunità, connettiti e scambia crediti di tempo.
members.title: Members

meta.title: Caring Community
meta.description: Coordinate time banking, volunteering, organisations, trusted support, and local impact.

caring_community.title: Caring Community
caring_community.subtitle: Bring time-bank exchange, verified volunteering, trusted organisations, groups, events, resources, and impact signals into one coordinated care workflow.

actions.request_help_sub: Ask your community for practical support
actions.offer_favour_sub: Record an informal act of kindness — no credits needed
actions.offer_time_sub: List a service or skill you can share
actions.markt_sub: Browse local services, goods and time-credit offers.
actions.loyalty_history_sub: See how you've used your earned hours at local merchants.
actions.future_care_fund_sub: See your banked hours as future-care insurance.
actions.hour_gift_sub: Give your banked hours to family or friends.
actions.hour_transfer_sub: Move banked hours to another KISS cooperative.
actions.cover_care_sub: Arrange trusted substitute support when a caregiver needs backup.
actions.projects_sub: Follow staged municipality and neighbourhood updates.

trusted_requests.title: Trusted requests
trusted_requests.description: Members can ask for practical support through time-bank listings and coordinator-led volunteering.

verified_hours.title: Verified hours
verified_hours.description: Support activity can flow through approvals, logs, reviews, and time-credit balances.

municipal_value.title: Municipal value
municipal_value.description: The module prepares the surface for canton, municipality, and cooperative impact reporting.

modules.title: Connected capabilities
modules.subtitle: The hub is only visible when the Caring Community switch is enabled.

timebank.title: Time bank
timebank.description: Coordinate offers, requests, reciprocity, and time-credit exchange.

volunteering.title: Volunteering
volunteering.description: Manage opportunities, applications, shifts, verification, and support hours.

organisations.title: Organisations
organisations.description: Bring cooperatives, local partners, and service providers into the care network.

events.title: Events
events.description: Run conferences, neighborhood cafes, trainings, and community sessions.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Support neighborhood circles, canton pilots, and working groups.

resources.title: Resources
resources.description: Share guides, privacy documents, playbooks, and onboarding material.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Track personal, community, and municipal support targets.

federation.title: Federation
federation.description: Connect regional nodes, cooperatives, and partner communities.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Keep member, coordinator, and organisation communication close to the work.

trust.title: Trust and verification
trust.description: Use identity, reviews, and compliance signals to support sensitive care workflows.

projects.title: Community projects
projects.description: Follow municipality works, cooperative milestones, and neighbourhood initiatives.

caring_community.welcome_banner: Welcome! Here you can ask for help, offer your time, or simply record a neighbourly kindness. Every contribution — big or small — makes your community stronger.

empty.title: No Support Relationships
empty.body: You have no active support relationships.

errors.load_failed: Could not load your support relationships.

my_support_relationships.subtitle: Your support connections — the people you help and those who help you.

form.what_label: What kind of help do you need?
form.what_placeholder: e.g. Help with grocery shopping, a lift to a medical appointment, company for a walk...
form.when_placeholder: e.g. Tuesday afternoons, as soon as possible...
form.what_too_long: Please keep your request under 500 characters.

success.title: Request Received
success.body: Your request has been received. A coordinator will be in touch soon.

errors.submit_failed: Could not submit your request. Please try again.

request_help.subtitle: Your neighbours care. Tell us what you need and we'll do our best to help.

valid.title: You're Invited
valid.body: You've been invited to join {{community}}'s Caring Community. Join us to exchange time, skills and support with your neighbours.

expired.title: This Invite Has Expired
expired.body: This invite link has expired. Please ask your coordinator for a new one.

used.title: Invite Already Used
used.body: This invite link has already been used. If you need help, please contact your coordinator.

invalid.title: Invalid Invite
invalid.body: This invite link is not valid. Please check the link and try again.

meta.title: Marktplatz
meta.description: Find services, goods and community offers near you

markt.subtitle: Discover time-credit services and local goods from your community — all in one place.
markt.marketplace_unavailable: The local marketplace is not enabled for this community.

errors.load_failed: Could not load the Marktplatz. Please try again.

error.unavailable: Location not available on this device
error.denied: Enable location in your browser settings

meta.title: Offer a Favour
meta.description: Record an informal act of neighbourly help

offer_favour.subtitle: No time credits needed — just record an act of kindness for your community.

form.what_label: What did you do to help?
form.what_placeholder: e.g. Helped carry shopping, gave a lift, shared a meal...
form.recipient_placeholder: Name, or leave blank to keep anonymous

success.title: Thank You!
success.body: Every act of kindness strengthens your community. Your favour has been recorded.

errors.submit_failed: Could not record your favour. Please try again.

meta.title: Clubs & Associations
meta.description: Discover local clubs and associations in your community

clubs.subtitle: Find local clubs, associations and groups that bring your community together.

empty.title: No Clubs Yet
empty.body: No clubs or associations have been listed yet.

errors.load_failed: Could not load clubs. Please try again.

loyalty.merchant_does_not_accept: This merchant does not accept time credits
loyalty.credits_to_use_label: How many hours would you like to use?

errors.insufficient_credits: Not enough time credits in your wallet.
errors.merchant_disabled: This merchant is no longer accepting time credits.
errors.exceeds_max: That exceeds the maximum discount allowed by this merchant.
errors.redemption_failed: Could not apply your credits. Please try again.

meta.title: My Time Credit Redemptions
meta.description: Your history of using time credits at local merchants

history.subtitle: See how you've used your earned hours at local businesses.

empty.title: No Redemptions Yet
empty.body: When you use your time credits at a local merchant, the redemption will appear here.

meta.title: Your Future Care Fund
meta.description: Hours you've banked for future care

future_care_fund.title: Your Future Care Fund
future_care_fund.subhead: Worth approximately CHF {{value}} — care you can call on when you need it
future_care_fund.intro: These are not just hours. They are the care you've banked in your community — to be drawn on for grocery runs, doctor visits, or simply company, whenever you need it.

reciprocity.title: Your Balance
reciprocity.strong_giver: You've given far more than you've received — your future fund is strong.
reciprocity.strong_receiver: You've received generously — when ready, give back to your community.

how_it_works.title: How your future care fund works
how_it_works.step1: Help your neighbours and earn hours
how_it_works.step2: Hours are banked safely in your community fund
how_it_works.step3: When you need help, redeem hours from your fund

errors.load_failed: Could not load your future care fund.

meta.title: Transfer Banked Hours
meta.description: Move your banked hours to another KISS cooperative

hour_transfer.title: Transfer Your Banked Hours
hour_transfer.subtitle: Moving to another community? Your banked hours go with you.

form.destination_help: The slug of the destination KISS cooperative or tenant
form.reason_placeholder: e.g. Moved house from Cham to Zug

hour_transfer.disclaimer: Hours will be debited from your wallet here when an admin approves. They will appear in your wallet at the destination cooperative once received.

errors.submit_failed: Could not request the transfer. Please try again.
errors.destination_not_found: We couldn't find that destination cooperative.
errors.no_matching_email: Your email is not registered at the destination cooperative — register there first.
errors.insufficient_hours: You don't have enough banked hours.

data_export.title: Download Your Data
data_export.subtitle: Your right to access and export everything we hold about you.
data_export.intro: This archive contains all data we hold about you in this community: your profile, hours given and received, support relationships, transactions, favours, listings, events, and more.

format.label: Format
format.json_help: A single structured file with all your data.
format.zip_help: Includes the JSON plus a README.md explaining each section.

data_export.warning: Your archive contains personal information. Keep it private.

history.title: Recent exports
history.empty: You haven't exported your data yet.

errors.rate_limit: You can request 5 exports per day. Please try again tomorrow.
errors.build_failed: We couldn't build your archive. Please try again or contact support.

meta.title: Gift Hours
meta.description: Gift your banked hours to another community member

hour_gift.title: Gift Your Hours
hour_gift.subtitle: Banked hours can be gifted to family, friends, or anyone who needs them.

send.recipient_label: Who would you like to gift hours to?
send.confirm_body: Your hours will be debited now and credited to them once they accept.

inbox.empty: No gifts to accept right now.

sent.empty: You haven't sent any gifts yet.

success.accepted: Gift accepted. The hours are now in your wallet.
success.declined: Gift declined. Hours returned to the sender.

errors.insufficient_balance: Not enough hours in your wallet.
errors.send_failed: Could not send the gift. Please try again.

inter_gen.tooltip: This support relationship spans generations — a hallmark of the KISS model.

meta.title: Report a Safeguarding Concern
meta.description: Report a concern about a member, coordinator, or organisation

submit.title: Report a Safeguarding Concern
submit.subtitle: Reporting concerns helps keep our community safe. Thank you for your courage.

form.category_label: What kind of concern is this?
form.description_placeholder: Please describe what you observed, when, and any context that would help a coordinator respond.

submit.confidentiality: Your report is sent only to designated safeguarding coordinators in your community. The person you report will not see your identity unless you choose to disclose it.

success.title: Report Submitted
success.body: Thank you. A safeguarding coordinator will review this within {{hours}} hours.

errors.submit_failed: We couldn't submit your report. Please try again or contact a coordinator directly.

my_reports.title: My Safeguarding Reports
my_reports.subtitle: Reports you have submitted and their current status.

push_campaign.field_title_desc: Short headline shown in the push notification.
push_campaign.field_body_placeholder: e.g. Visit us this Saturday for 20% off all services.
push_campaign.field_body_desc: The main body text of the push notification.
push_campaign.field_schedule_at_desc: Leave blank to send immediately after approval.

push_campaign.field_trust_tier_desc: Only reach members at or above this trust level.
